title: OptionMarketsResponseDtoV2
description: Option market data returned by the v1.1 multi-chain endpoint, including 24h statistics and liquidity metrics

deprecated.description: Whether this option market is deprecated

address.description: Contract address of the option market

primePool.description: Address of the primary Uniswap v3 pool for this market

optionsPricing.description: Address of the options pricing contract (Black-Scholes)

tokenURIFetcher.description: Address of the ERC721 token URI fetcher

ticker.description: Short ticker symbol for the market

chainId.description: EVM chain ID where this market is deployed

feeStrategy.description: Fee strategy configuration for this market

premiums24h.description: Total option premiums collected in the last 24 hours (USD)

volume24h.description: Total trading volume in the last 24 hours (USD)

protocolFees24h.description: Protocol fees earned in the last 24 hours (USD)

totalLiquidity.description: Total liquidity available in the market (USD)

availableLiquidity.description: Liquidity available for new options purchases (USD)

openInterest.description: Current open interest across all strikes (USD)
